title: New login and push tests
body:
Test podman login/logout, login with wrong credentials,
auth file contents, auth file path override, push/pull,
and, if skopeo is installed, credentials sharing

Fixes: #4283

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>

comments.body:
I'm going to try this, but Github may be busted enough it doesn't work
/approve

New force-push: disabled all tests under podman-remote.

IMPORTANT NOTE: `skopeo` is not installed in the CI environment, so the skopeo-podman auth-sharing tests are being skipped. I don't know how to update CI setups and don't dare do so without Chris.

Nice job.  When @cevich gets back we can work to get skopeo installed in AMIs.
/lgtm

> we can work to get skopeo installed in AMIs.

Got it added into my #3901 where I need to rebuild the VM images anyway to add dnsmasq.
